fields.name: Subheadline
fields.default: We handle the full vendor lifecycle — from figuring out what to prioritize, to signing the contract.

default.headline: Effort Prioritization
default.description: Proprietary scoring ranks your top projects by impact, cost, complexity, and urgency. A defensible, data-driven starting point.

default.headline: Evaluation Management
default.description: End-to-end coordination of vendor presentations, demos, solution design, and proposals. Structured. Efficient. Thorough.

default.headline: Negotiation & Contracts
default.description: We advocate on your side through pricing negotiations and legal coordination. We know what fair looks like.

default.headline: Proof of Concept
default.description: Managed PoCs with clear evaluation criteria. Test in your real environment before committing.
